title: Fetch & Display Data
description:
Build a component that fetches a list of users from an API and displays them with proper loading and error states.

### Requirements

- On mount, fetch users from the provided `apiUrl` prop
- Show a loading skeleton while the request is in progress
- Display the list of users after successful fetch
- Show an error message with a retry button if the fetch fails
- Clicking retry re-attempts the fetch
- Clean up any in-flight requests if the component unmounts (abort controller)

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Loading state | `loading` |
| Error message | `error` |
| Retry button | `retry-btn` |
| User list | `user-list` |
| User item | `user-{id}` |
constraints:
- Must use fetch API (not axios or libraries)
- Must handle loading, success, and error states
- Must implement abort on unmount
- Retry must re-attempt the request
- Must not set state after unmount
hints: Create an AbortController, pass its signal to fetch, and call controller.abort() in the useEffect cleanup.
Use three pieces of state: data, isLoading, and error. Or use a single state with a discriminated union.
Wrap the fetch call in an async function inside useEffect. Don't make the effect itself async.
